title: Objects
hint: Manage the images your stories reference. Add metadata, verify IIIF tiles, and import external sources.
empty_description: Your objects library is empty. Sync from your repo to import existing objects, or add an external IIIF object manually.
sync_description: Check the changes you would like to sync (pull) from GitHub.
sync_no_changes: No changes detected. Your objects are up to date.
sync_missing_warning: These objects exist in the compositor but not in the repo. They may have been deleted from objects.csv.
sync_unregistered_hint: These image files are in the objects folder but not yet listed on this Compositor or the project spreadsheets. Register them to add metadata.
add_iiif_error_fetch: Could not reach the manifest URL. Check the URL and try again.
add_iiif_error_invalid: The URL does not point to a valid IIIF manifest.
add_iiif_error_parse: The manifest could not be parsed. It may use an unsupported format.
viewer_tiles_unavailable: Tiles are not yet available for this object. A site build may be in progress — try again in a few minutes.
delete_description: Delete '{{title}}'? This will remove the object from the compositor. Your published site won't change until you publish again.
staleHeadError: The repository has changed since your last sync. Please re-sync before saving.
commitFailed: Build failed. Check GitHub Actions for details.
sheetsWarning: Google Sheets is currently enabled for this site. Saving will disable it so the build uses your compositor data instead.
sheetsReversible: You can switch back to Google Sheets at any time by setting enabled: true under google_sheets in your site's _config.yml.
buildQueued: Build queued — waiting for GitHub Actions...
buildFailed: Build failed. Check GitHub Actions for details.
commitModal.description: To register {{count}} new object(s) we need to update your site's objects.csv on GitHub. This will trigger a build and produce the IIIF tiles you need to work with these images in the compositor.
commitModal.urlMismatch: Your site's URL in _config.yml doesn't match your GitHub Pages deployment.
commitModal.urlFix: We'll correct this automatically so the IIIF tiles work properly.
